summary: Iteration 9 — Inbound Resend Webhook + Admin Inbox UI + Profile Mana/UserLevelBadge + Avatar blob preview. All backend pytest cases PASS (12/12 in /app/backend/tests/test_inbox_features.py) and all 4 frontend criteria PASS. No critical regression. /api/webhook/resend/inbound accepts both nested and flat payloads, persists to Mongo and notifies admins. Admin Inbox UI fully wired (list/filter/search/detail/toggle-read/archive). ProfilePage shows UserLevelBadge (level=2 'Régulier' for demo) + 'Mana' stat column (✨ 0). Avatar preview uses blob: URLs (not data:).

minor.issue: RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET only logs a warning if signature header missing — never actually verifies signature or rejects the request. Anyone with the URL can flood db.inbound_emails.
No body-size limit / per-IP rate limit on a public unauthenticated endpoint — could be abused for DB bloat.

issues: Console warning: Received `true` for non-boolean attribute (UserLevelBadge `animate` prop becomes JSX attr on a styled div). Convert to lowercase string or remove from DOM via styled-component shouldForwardProp.
Uses native window.confirm('Archiver cet email ?') — blocks Playwright tests unless dialog is auto-accepted, and provides poor UX. Replace with a shadcn AlertDialog.

passed_tests: BE ✅ POST /api/webhook/resend/inbound (nested {type,data:{}}) → 200 {received:true, inbound_id:'in_*'} + Mongo doc created with from/subject/attachments + read:false + archived:false
BE ✅ POST /api/webhook/resend/inbound (flat payload) → 200, normalised to same Mongo shape
BE ✅ GET /api/admin/inbox → 200 with items[]/total/unread/page, html+headers+_id stripped from list view
BE ✅ GET /api/admin/inbox?filter_read=unread → returns only read:false items
BE ✅ GET /api/admin/inbox?q=TEST_NESTED → search on from/subject/text works (regex i-case)
BE ✅ GET /api/admin/inbox/{id} → returns full doc (incl html) and auto-marks read:true (verified in Mongo)
BE ✅ POST /api/admin/inbox/{id}/read {read:false} → toggles read state both ways
BE ✅ DELETE /api/admin/inbox/{id} → archived:true; item disappears from default list

FE ✅ /admin/inbox renders [data-testid='admin-inbox-page'] with refresh+search+filter-all/unread/read all visible; freshly-seeded inbound_id item appears, click opens detail (inbox-detail-subject = 'TEST_UI Bonjour Inbox'), toggle-read + archive buttons visible; search 'TEST_UI' keeps the item visible; filter cycling works

FE ✅ /profile (demo) — [data-testid='profile-mana-score'] visible with '✨ 0 Mana', [data-testid='user-level-badge-2'] visible next to name, third stat column 'Mana' rendered (Publications=3, Amis=0, Mana=0), 'mana:updated' CustomEvent dispatches without error
FE ✅ /profile/edit — uploading a local PNG produces an (1 blob URL, 0 data: URLs) confirming URL.createObjectURL optimisation
action_items: (Optional, P2) Implement actual signature verification in /api/webhook/resend/inbound (use svix or Resend's HMAC SHA-256) — currently only logs a warning.
(Optional, P3) Replace AdminInboxPage archive window.confirm with a shadcn AlertDialog for consistency + testability.
(Optional, P3) Fix React warning on UserLevelBadge `animate` prop leaking to DOM (use a non-boolean prop name or filter via shouldForwardProp).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L2058-2062: RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET signature is read but never verified — only a warning log. Anyone hitting /api/webhook/resend/inbound can flood the inbox. Replace with proper HMAC verification + 401 on mismatch.
server.py L2090-2091: text trimmed to 50k chars / html to 200k. Reasonable, but no overall request body size limit — consider a FastAPI middleware capping content-length (e.g., 5 MB) to prevent DoS.
AdminInboxPage.js L129: window.confirm() is non-testable & non-i18n-friendly. Migrate to shadcn AlertDialog (the rest of the app already uses it).
UserLevelBadge: `animate` prop is forwarded to DOM, triggering 'non-boolean attribute' React warning on ProfilePage. Use `data-animate` or filter via styled-component prop config.

server.py L2065: `data = payload.get('data') if isinstance(payload.get('data'), dict) else payload` — if a sender passes flat data with a `data` key that is not a dict (e.g., a string), falls back to root payload which is correct. But `subject` truncation in notification uses subject[:60] without sanitising — if subject contains \n it could break message line. Minor.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required testids present on /admin/inbox, /profile, /profile/edit; blob: URL preview confirmed)

seed_data_creation: Tests created 2 inbound_emails docs (TEST_NESTED + TEST_FLAT) then deleted them in test_cleanup. UI test created 1 additional inbound 'TEST_UI Bonjour Inbox' which is still present in Mongo (admin can archive via UI). Admin notifications of type 'inbound_email' linked to the test inbounds are cleaned by the fixture.

mocked_apis_list: Resend inbound webhook — no real MX records configured locally, so we POST fake payloads directly to /api/webhook/resend/inbound. Both Resend-nested ({type, data:{}}) and SendGrid-flat shapes are validated. In production, configure MX + RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET and ACTIVATE signature verification (see action_items).

context_for_next_testing_agent: New regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_inbox_features.py — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL + MONGO_URL + DB_NAME exported. The webhook /api/webhook/resend/inbound is mounted on `app` (not api_router); the four /api/admin/inbox/* endpoints require Bearer admin token. Admin UI exposed at /admin/inbox with these testids: admin-inbox-page, inbox-refresh-btn, inbox-search-input, inbox-filter-{all|unread|read}, inbox-item-{id}, inbox-detail-subject, inbox-toggle-read-btn, inbox-archive-btn, inbox-reply-btn. ProfilePage exposes [data-testid='profile-mana-score'] + [data-testid='user-level-badge-{1..5}']. EditProfilePage avatar preview is now blob: (URL.createObjectURL), instant. Outstanding non-blocking items: webhook signature verification, UserLevelBadge animate prop warning, window.confirm in archive flow.
rca_of_the_issue: No bug. All 4 review-request features behave as specified.
